changes: Increase automated branch coverage above 80% by adding tests for more edge-case app behavior.
Add more automated tests for edge-case behavior so app reliability is checked more thoroughly.
Align dark mode styling with WealthTrack so the app feels consistent when using night mode.
Update npm dependencies to the latest compatible patch and minor versions.
Increase unit test coverage to the same 80% quality target used in WealthTrack.
Fix mobile navigation so vertical scrolling works correctly on phones when the menu is open.
Update automated workflows to improve linting and test coverage reporting in pull requests.
